# Point Blank

Point Blank is the premier student-run open source and research tech community based in Bangalore, India (DSCE). We are a collective of developers, designers, and tech enthusiasts who build projects, compete in hackathons, publish research, and participate in open-source development.

## Key Resources

- [Home](https://pointblank.club/): Information about our mission, vision, activities, domains, and our community leads.
- [Members](https://pointblank.club/members): List of current leads, alumni leads, active members, and alumni.
- [Achievements](https://pointblank.club/achievements): Our track record in GSoC, LFX, Hackathons, Smart India Hackathon (SIH), ACM, and Competitive Programming.
- [Talks & Conferences](https://pointblank.club/talks): Presentation slides, workshops, and conference sessions delivered by our members.
- [PB Hustle](https://pointblank.club/hustle): Standings and rankings from our internal coding contests.
- [Lore](https://pointblank.club/lore): Chronicles of our shared journeys, hackathons, and adventures.
- [Open Source Software (OSS) Footprint](https://pointblank.club/oss): Dashboard tracking merged pull requests and open source contributions by our members.

## Optional

- [llms-full.txt](https://pointblank.club/llms-full.txt): Full site content for AI assistants
